Title: Entrepreneurship Readiness
Description: Assess how ready you are to start or scale a business — across idea validation, skills, mindset, and financial runway.
SchemaJson: {"id":"entrepreneurship_readiness_v1","title":"Entrepreneurship Readiness","version":"1.0","questions":[{"id":"q1","type":"choice","label":"Where are you in your entrepreneurial journey?","options":["Just exploring the idea of starting a business","I have an idea but have not validated it yet","I am validating my idea with real customers","I have launched and am building revenue","I am growing an existing business"],"required":true},{"id":"q2","type":"rating","label":"How well have you validated that a real market exists for your idea?","min":1,"max":5,"required":true},{"id":"q3","type":"choice","label":"What is your biggest barrier to starting or growing your business?","options":["Lack of a clear idea or niche","Fear of failure or risk","Not enough time alongside other commitments","Lack of capital or funding","Missing skills or knowledge"],"required":true},{"id":"q4","type":"rating","label":"How confident are you in your ability to sell and acquire customers?","min":1,"max":5,"required":true},{"id":"q5","type":"text","label":"Describe your business idea in one sentence, or the type of business you want to build.","required":false}]}
